summary: High‑energy July show with Dylan & Petty guests and a feisty Jerry opening on Alabama Getaway; recording source unknown but listenable.
review: Fans rave about the magical outdoor atmosphere, the surprise Dylan/Petty appearances and Jerry’s spirited “Alabama Getaway” opener despite a slightly strained vocal. The performance is described as energetic and jam‑rich, while reviewers give no concrete details on the audio fidelity, suggesting an average but acceptable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments about the show (energy, guest appearances, standout song) outweigh the lack of recording‑quality details; overall rating reflects a good performance with an unknown but likely adequate source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention soundboard, audience bleed, clarity or any technical issues, leaving the recording quality indeterminate.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a magical July afternoon/evening with high energy, guest spots by Dylan and Petty, and a lively, jam‑filled set that fed off the enthusiastic outdoor crowd.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Voice described as strained but feisty; opened with Alabama Getaway and was in a fun mood.
